title: DURACELL MN21 (2 Pack) Specialty Alkaline Battery 12V (A23/23A/V23GA/LRV08/8LR932) – Long life guarantee – For Remotes, Wireless Doorbells, Security Systems – 5–Year Storage Guarantee -Leak Prevention
features: SUITABLE FOR A WIDE RANGE OF DEVICES: Duracell MN21 specialty alkaline batteries 12V (A23 / 23A / V23GA / LRV08 / 8LR932) are ideal for your remote controls, wireless doorbells, security systems (alarms, locators) and more.
LONG LIFE GUARANTEED: you can be confident these batteries will be ready when you need them.
5 YEARS IN STORAGE GUARANTEED: Our technologies keep unused batteries fresh for up to 5 years in their packaging
LEAKAGE PREVENTION: superior nylon top closure helps prevent our specialty batteries from leakage.
RELIABLE batteries for your specialty devices
description: Product Description DURACELL MN21 specialty alkaline batteries are long life guaranteed for your specialty devices. They are suitable for use in remote controls, wireless doorbells, security systems (alarms, locators) and more. With 5 years in storage, you can be confident they will be ready when you need them. Ingredients Alkaline Safety Warning Attention: Check the correct polarity (+/-). Do not disassemble, reload or throw into fire. Do not mix old and new batteries, different brands or types. Keep out of reach of children. Do not swallow. If swallowed, consult a doctor immediately. Box Contains 2 x Battery See more
